headline: Stanley Black's Engineered Fastening Growth Picks Up: More Upside to Come?
summary: SWK's Engineered Fastening segment is gaining from aerospace and automotive demand, while cost-saving efforts support profitability.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Stanley Black & Decker, Core & Main, Kennametal and Enerpac Tool Group
summary: Manufacturing tools firms face cost and supply-chain pressures, but acquisitions and manufacturing strength are supporting growth opportunities.
